Documentation.short_help: Split dataset into tet volume (object_id=1) and surface partitions by sharp edges and connectivity.
Documentation.long_help: Tetrahedra (if any) are extracted and become the first top-level block under vtkDataAssembly IOSS/element_blocks/tetrahedra with object_id=1 and contiguous GlobalIds (1..N) for IOSS writers. The surface for side/node sets is vtkDataSetSurfaceFilter applied only to that tet-only submesh (not the full mixed grid), with element_side for Exodus side sets. That surface is split by feature angle and connectivity; for each region i: side{i} then node{i}. Non-unstructured or no-tet inputs: polydata as-is, or surface of the whole dataset. Block metadata sets NAME and vtkIOSSReader ENTITY_ID only.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature angle (deg)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Dihedral angle threshold for vtkPolyDataNormals splitting (cusp / sharp edge split). Larger values merge more smooth neighborhoods; smaller values split more aggressively.
